prompt: A serene anime-style illustration of Enkidu reimagined as an androgynous feminine-presenting young adult with extremely long straight light green hair, seated on the grass and leaning against the broad trunk of a huge old tree in a sunlit lakeside park. The character has a slim elegant build and wears a slightly oversized white button-up shirt with soft folds, light beige or taupe tailored trousers, and simple white slip-on shoes. Pose the figure in a relaxed resting position with one knee bent upward, the other leg extended forward, hands resting loosely in the lap, body angled slightly to the viewer’s left, and long hair spilling down over the shoulders, past the waist, and pooling across the grass. Set the scene in bright late-morning or afternoon natural light with dappled leaf shadows crossing the clothing, hair, ground, and tree bark. In the background, show a calm blue lake, a paved walking path along the water, 1 wooden park bench on the left, 1 black lamppost near the bench, and 1 small gazebo or pavilion across the water, with lush green trees reflected in the lake under a vivid blue sky with scattered white clouds. Add small white and purple wildflowers in the foreground grass, detailed bark texture with patches of moss on the tree, and a peaceful contemplative mood. Highly detailed, painterly anime illustration, soft cinematic composition, crisp foliage, gentle breeze implied by the hair, SFW, no text, no watermark.
